headline: Israel renews strikes in southern Lebanon one day after ceasefire extension
description: Lebanon's National News Agency reported airstrikes on at least five villages in the south. The Israeli military launched the attack just one day after the two parties agreed to extend the truce by 45 days.

headline: Cannes 2026: Why American cinema is not taking center stage on the Croisette this year
A smooth Trump-Xi summit masked deeper competing motives
Israel says it killed head of Hamas' military wing
description: The Israeli military and Hamas officials confirmed the death of Ezz al-Din al-Haddad on Saturday after an Israeli strike targeted a residential building in Gaza City.

headline: Pope Leo to visit France in September
description: The Vatican announced that the pope's state visit will take place from September 25 to 28. He is expected to visit Paris and Lourdes, in southwestern France.

headline: Eurovision 2026: Israel's participation sparks controversy
description: In an unprecedented move, five countries – Spain, Ireland, Iceland, the Netherlands and Slovenia – are boycotting the event in protest over the presence of an Israeli contestant. Pro-Palestinian demonstrations are also planned in Vienna, where the final will be held on Saturday, May 16.

headline: Bendor Island, hotel paradise that combines luxury with holiday spirit for everyone
description: Opposite the city of Bandol, on the French Riviera, this utopia nestled on seven hectares purchased in 1950 by industrialist Paul Ricard has just been revived after five years of renovations. The development now offers luxury hotels and gourmet restaurants, as well as an art gallery, a café, pétanque courts and a crêpe stand.

How China is cracking down on its Christians
description: Le Monde verified footage from Chinese social media and collected testimonies from victims of Beijing's crackdown to reveal how the regime has brought independent churches to heel since Xi Jinping came to power.

headline: Military researcher Céline Marangé on the Ukraine war: 'What is truly in danger is the future of European liberal democracy'
description: In an interview with Le Monde, the political scientist places the conflict in Ukraine within the long history of Russian imperialism and assesses the threat that the Kremlin poses to NATO and EU countries.

headline: Trump, with ambitions for Mars, Canada and Greenland, tries to reclaim frontier myth of pioneer America
description: Since the very beginning, the US has based its growth on the conquest of new geographical or political frontiers. In this spirit, the current president speaks of other lands – on Earth and in space – while the rise of artificial intelligence opens up uncharted territories.
